goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 21:45' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'phone number', and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 21:45 and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on friday
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get postcode, phone number, and entrance fee
